tree.name: Aaron Wiggins
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted 55th overall by OKC using MIN's pick (via GSW). Acquired from Golden State in Kelly Oubre Jr. trade (Nov 22, 2020).
tree.note: Pick chain: MIN owned → GSW acquired → OKC (Oubre trade)

assetsGivenUp.name: Kelly Oubre Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Phoenix in Chris Paul trade. Flipped to GSW 6 days later (Nov 22) for draft picks including #55 (Wiggins).
assetsGivenUp.note: OKC sent CP3 to PHX, received Oubre, Rubio, picks. Oubre immediately flipped to GSW.

assetsGivenUp.name: Chris Paul
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Houston in Russell Westbrook trade. Traded to Phoenix (Nov 16, 2020) for Oubre, Rubio, and picks.

assetsGivenUp.name: Russell Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 4th overall by Seattle with their own lottery pick. Traded to Houston (Jul 16, 2019) for Chris Paul and draft picks.
